entries.definition:
ḍ-h-ʾ to be kind, to treat gently; to be similar, to resemble,
to imitate. Of this root, يضاهئون yuḍāhiʾūn, occurs once in the
Qurʾan.

يضاهي yuḍāhiʾ [imperf. of v. III ضاهأ ḍāhaʾa, trans.] to imitate,
to resemble (9:30) ذلك قولهم بأفواههم يضاهئون قول الذين كفروا من قبل
that is what they say with their own mouths, imitating the sayings of
those who disbelieved before.
